Name: LoadBalancerNewDrawDistScaleParam_xb1
Description: Determines the draw distance scale configuration for the FPS load balancer.

Fields.Name: Draw Distance: Start
Fields.Description: The start activation level for the draw distance scaling.

Fields.Name: Draw Distance: End
Fields.Description: The end activation level for the draw distance scaling.

Fields.Name: Draw Distance: Start (Shadow)
Fields.Description: The start activation level for the draw distance scaling of shadows.

Fields.Name: Draw Distance: End (Shadow)
Fields.Description: The end activation level for the draw distance scaling of shadows.

Fields.Name: Scale: Start (Shadow)
Fields.Description: The start draw distance scale for shadows.

Fields.Name: Scale: End (Shadow)
Fields.Description: The end draw distance scale for shadows.
